files.description: Repo charter and the load-bearing invariants. § 'Hard refusal triggers' carries the DR-035 § 8 hard-refusal catalog (the source of truth for this repo — the DR itself lives in intent-eval-lab/000-docs/). Also documents the anti-corruption layer (consume @intentsolutions/core, never vendor), the verify-before-render ingest contract (DR-035 B1), the default visibility tiers (C2), the C3 aggregate-PASS%-across-predicates ban, and the no-data-shown-loudly binding (C4). Read this before reviewing any change to src/, site/, scripts/, or deploy/.

Retraction protocol 4h-SLO operator runbook. Governs src/retraction/ — the integrity capability to take down a published attestation honestly via an append-only signed retraction/v1 record + 410 Gone + tombstone, with no site rebuild. Predicate URI is the kernel RETRACTION_V1_URI at evals.* (never labs.*); reason_class is a closed enum sourced from the kernel.

Internal testing dashboard design RFC. Context for the operator-internal (site-internal/) surface — the tailnet-only superset of the public results browser. Operator views are Tailscale-identity-gated, never basicauth; internal output goes to site-internal/, never the public site/ origin.
